description: Towards the end of an event, a food and beverage manager decides to close a low-traffic concession stand early.

nodes.task_description: Review the real-time sales data for all concession stands.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies that Stand 22 has had no sales in the last 30 minutes.

nodes.task_description: Authorize the manager of Stand 22 to begin closing procedures.
Reassign the staff from Stand 22 to help with closing procedures at busier stands.

expected_outcome.value: Agent updates the staff assignments to reinforce other locations.
